title: Companion — A Photographic Lexicon
medium: six ComfyUI photographs (RealVisXL V5.0), one per glossary verb: to nobori, to pollard, to shakkei, to cycle, to tulip, to stoep. dictionary entries paired with images of the verbs in their most recognizable state of stillness.
caption: The glossary treats civic objects as verbs that slowed until they looked still. The photographs are the freeze.
